title: $:/plugins/rimir/explide/examples/mini-app
description: Mini app — counter with state, demonstrating adhoc tiddlers
rri.adhoc-tiddler:Output:
\define increment()
<$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/state/counter" text={{{[{$:/state/counter}add[1]]}}}/>
\end

\define reset()
<$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/state/counter" text="0"/>
\end

! Counter: {{{[{$:/state/counter}else[0]]}}}

<$button actions=<<increment>>>+1</$button>
<$button actions=<<reset>>>Reset</$button>
rri.adhoc-tiddler:README:
This is a minimal counter app built entirely with adhoc tiddlers inside an explide sandbox.

It demonstrates:
* State management with `$:/state/` tiddlers
* Action widgets (`$action-setfield`)
* Filtered transclusion (`{{{ }}}`)

Open the ''ADHOC'' tab to edit the source.
